Jessica Taylor
Houston, TX

Summary
Enthusiastic and detail-oriented customer service representative with over 3 years of experience in retail environments. Proven ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced setting while providing excellent customer support. Looking to transition into a warehouse role to leverage my organizational skills and dedication to teamwork.

Experience
Sales Associate  
Target, Houston, TX  
June 2020 - Present  
- Assisted customers with product inquiries, returns, and transactions in a busy retail environment.  
- Maintained a clean and organized store layout to enhance customer shopping experiences.  
- Collaborated with team members to meet sales goals and improve service delivery.  

Customer Service Representative  
Best Buy, Houston, TX  
January 2019 - May 2020  
- Handled customer inquiries via phone and in-store, providing solutions and support.  
- Processed sales transactions and assisted with inventory management tasks.  
- Trained new employees on customer service protocols and product knowledge.

Certifications
- CPR and First Aid Certified, 2022
